en: Let the holidays begin!
Okay, now... Surprise!
Uh-oh. Wait, wait, wait. Hold on, hold on. Going so soon?
The yule bell rang. I must get home for my family's holiday tradition, rolling the lefse.
ko: 율벨이 울렸어. 우리 가족 전통인 레프세를 만들러 가야 해.

en: Ours is putting out porridge for the tom-tah.
ko: 우리는 톰타에게 죽을 내놓는 게 전통이야.

en: Well, we're making traditional board stovel-buckles.
And I'm gonna filet the crumbs of the cringley-conka.
That's a thing, right? Oh, Mr. and Mrs. Alston, you're welcome to join us in the castle if you'd like.
ko: 그게 있는 거 맞지? 아, 올스턴 부부, 원하시면 성에서 함께해요.

en: Thank you, Your Majesty. But Olga and I should be getting home to knit socks for our grandchildren.
ko: 감사합니다, 폐하. 하지만 저희는 집에 가서 손자들 양말을 짜야 해요.

en: It's our tradition. Yes, and we wouldn't want to intrude on your family traditions.
ko: 그게 우리 전통이에요. 네, 가족 전통에 끼어들 수 없죠.

en: Hmm. Oh, so the surprise is everyone left.
Hey, I say it's their loss.
Who needs a big party anyway? Christophe?
ko: 어차피 큰 파티가 뭐가 필요해? 크리스토프?

en: I've got just the thing to cheer you up. My favorite traditional troll... tradition.
ko: 기분 풀어줄 게 있어. 내가 좋아하는 전통 트롤... 전통.

en: Hmm. Care to join in? Uh, yeah.
Okay, it starts with a gathering song.
The Ballad of Flemingrad. I love ballads!
Every December we all gather round To pay our respects to a troll so renowned
ko: 매년 12월 우리 모두 모여 유명한 트롤에게 경의를 표하지.

en: In remembrance of the friend
We had a jolly old soul we called Flemingrad Tempo!
We all dig deep down and we uproot the past
ko: 우리 모두 깊이 파고들어 과거를 뿌리째 뽑아

en: We shove up its nostrils, a fistful of grass Nostrils?
ko: 콧구멍에 풀 한 줌을 밀어넣지. 콧구멍?

en: We sheep his likeness, bless his soul
ko: 그의 모습을 만들어, 그의 영혼을 축복하며

en: Whoa, gross. Oh, Flemy the Fungus
Troll Now you lick his forehead and make a wish.
Who's next? Elsa, you're up.
Come on, tastes like lichen. You're a princess.
ko: 이리 와, 이끼 맛이야. 넌 공주잖아.

en: You don't have to saddle. Okay, not so much a royal activity. I get it.
ko: 그렇게까지 안 해도 돼. 왕족 활동은 아니지. 알겠어.
